# Trip Billing Invoicing

> Calculate and manage trip-based billing, service rates, and invoice generation for completed deliveries

**Category:** Payment · **Version:** 1.0.0 · **Tags:** fleet · billing · invoice · payment · service-rate · transaction

## What this does

Calculate and manage trip-based billing, service rates, and invoice generation for completed deliveries

Specifies 5 acceptance outcomes that any implementation must satisfy, regardless of language or framework.

## Fields

- **transaction_id** *(text, required)* — Transaction ID
- **order_uuid** *(text, required)* — Order
- **customer_uuid** *(text, required)* — Customer
- **service_quote_uuid** *(text, optional)* — Service Quote
- **purchase_rate_uuid** *(text, optional)* — Applied Rate
- **gateway** *(text, optional)* — Payment Gateway
- **gateway_transaction_id** *(text, optional)* — Gateway Transaction ID
- **amount** *(number, required)* — Amount (minor units)
- **currency** *(text, required)* — Currency (ISO 4217)
- **description** *(text, optional)* — Description
- **type** *(select, required)* — Transaction Type
- **status** *(select, required)* — Status
- **service_name** *(text, optional)* — Service Name
- **service_type** *(select, optional)* — Rate Type
- **base_fee** *(number, optional)* — Base Fee (minor units)
- **per_meter_fee** *(number, optional)* — Per-Meter Fee
- **cod_amount** *(number, optional)* — COD Amount
- **cod_currency** *(text, optional)* — COD Currency

## What must be true

- **completion_triggers_billing:** Trip billing is calculated at order completion using the matched service rate
- **rate_matching:** Service rates are matched by service area, zone, and order configuration
- **rate_calculation_methods:** Rate calculation methods: flat fee, per-meter, or custom algorithm
- **peak_hour_surcharges:** Peak-hour surcharges are applied automatically based on dispatch time
- **cod_tracking:** Cash-on-delivery (COD) amounts are tracked separately from service fees
- **minor_currency_units:** All monetary amounts are stored in minor currency units to avoid floating-point errors
- **full_audit_trail:** Transactions are linked to the order, customer, and service quote for audit
- **refund_limit:** Refunds can only be issued for paid transactions and must not exceed the original amount
- **voided_closed:** Voided invoices cannot be reopened; a new transaction must be created
- **tax_compliance:** Tax calculation must comply with the organization's configured tax rules and jurisdiction

## Success & failure scenarios

**✅ Success paths**

- **Bill Calculated** — when order.completed event received; service rate is configured for the order type and area, then Trip cost calculated and invoice created.
- **Payment Successful** — when status eq "processing"; payment gateway confirms success, then Payment confirmed and order fully settled.
- **Refund Issued** — when status eq "paid", then Refund transaction created and processed.

**❌ Failure paths**

- **No Service Rate Found** — when no service rate matches the order type, area, and configuration, then Billing failed — no matching service rate configured. *(error: `BILLING_NO_RATE_FOUND`)*
- **Payment Failed** — when payment gateway returns failure, then Payment failed; retry or alternative payment method required. *(error: `BILLING_PAYMENT_FAILED`)*

## Errors it can return

- `BILLING_PAYMENT_FAILED` — Payment could not be processed. Please try again or use a different payment method.
- `BILLING_NO_RATE_FOUND` — No service rate is configured for this order type and area.
- `BILLING_REFUND_EXCEEDS_ORIGINAL` — Refund amount cannot exceed the original charge.
- `BILLING_INVALID_CURRENCY` — The specified currency is not supported.

## Connects to

- **order-lifecycle** *(required)* — Billing is triggered on order completion
- **service-area-management** *(required)* — Service rates are bound to service areas
- **driver-earnings-payouts** *(recommended)* — Driver earnings are derived from trip billing
- **fleet-customer-contacts** *(recommended)* — Customer billing details come from contact management
